title: Totem stasis
body:
Ever been in a dungeon, stuck in a fight, or about to die in PvP and wished you could just teleport back to safety? That’s exactly what Emergency Totem does.

With a single-use totem, you’ll get a cinematic pop when it activates, then teleport back to the location you saved with /ts. You can make it instant or have a small delay for extra drama — totally up to you!

/ts command to save your spot and get your totem

Works on all 1.21.x Paper/Spigot servers
